text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
O-oh no... I lent out my notebook<n>without
thinking about it...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
But I've just realized, I think I drew<n>something in
it... What was it again?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: A cat? ...A dog? It might've been Okafrom the manga Uma ☆ Koi...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Ooh... I hope they don't find it!
